action.description: Action function containing the instructions executed when a rule triggers.

author.description: Script author name or contact reference.

categories.description: One or more NSE categories assigned to the script.

comment.description: Comment or analyst note about the NSE script.

dependencies.description: Names of scripts that should run before this script if also selected.

description.description: Brief synopsis and optional detailed description of the NSE script.

hostrule.description: Rule function determining whether the script runs against a host.

portrule.description: Rule function determining whether the script runs against a port.

postrule.description: Rule function executed after scanning is complete.

prerule.description: Rule function executed before host discovery or port scanning.

reference.description: Reference or origin of the NSE script.

version.description: Version of Nmap or NSE the script is associated with.

description: An object describing an Nmap NSE script using the standard NSE script format fields.
name: nse
